summary: 当前围绕已选中的压缩机、分离器及其下游未连接气相物流生成候选提案，重点处理有直接诊断支撑的局部问题：压缩机出口压力目标低于入口压力、最小流量旁路参数缺失、分离器固定压力目标缺失，以及分离器气相出口未连接。

issues.message: Separator Gas 94 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Recycle Compressor 22 outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.
Recycle Compressor 22 anti-surge review requires minimum flow bypass percent, but the parameter is missing.
Intermediate Separator 22 is configured for fixed pressure mode but the operating pressure target is missing.
Recycle Compressor 22 efficiency_percent=58 is outside the recommended operating range.
Separator Gas 94 routing still depends on the current compressor discharge and separator pressure context.

answers.text: 针对 compressor-22、separator-22 和 separator-gas-94 提出最小且可审查的候选 patch；其中参数类修补可直接作为占位或局部更新审阅，未连接气相物流仅建议补充连接占位，不假定具体下游对象。

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_DISCONNECTED
citations.excerpt: Separator Gas 94 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_INVALID
citations.excerpt: Recycle Compressor 22 outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Recycle Compressor 22 anti-surge review requires minimum flow bypass percent, but the parameter is missing.

citations.label: 诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE
citations.excerpt: Intermediate Separator 22 is configured for fixed pressure mode but the operating pressure target is missing.

citations.label: 诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE
citations.excerpt: Recycle Compressor 22 efficiency_percent=58 is outside the recommended operating range.

citations.label: 诊断 DOWNSTREAM_STATE_DEPENDENT
citations.excerpt: Separator Gas 94 routing still depends on the current compressor discharge and separator pressure context.

proposed_actions.title: 为 Separator Gas 94 提议补充下游连接占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 该物流存在明确的未连接诊断，但同时诊断指出其路由依赖当前压缩机排出与分离器压力上下文，因此不能在缺乏更多证据时假定具体接收设备。最小 patch 仅建议增加 downstream consumer 或 export sink 的连接占位，供人工确认实际去向。

proposed_actions.title: 为 Recycle Compressor 22 提议修正出口压力目标并补充防喘振旁路参数
proposed_actions.rationale: 诊断直接表明压缩机出口压力目标低于入口压力，且 anti-surge review 所需的 minimum flow bypass percent 缺失。为保持 patch 最小且非执行式，这里仅提出将无效目标改为高于当前入口压力的待确认占位，并补充缺失参数占位；不在当前证据不足时直接改动效率参数。

value_placeholder.description: 设为高于 feed-94 当前 190 kPa 入口压力的有效压缩机出口压力目标

proposed_actions.title: 为 Intermediate Separator 22 提议补充固定压力目标参数
proposed_actions.rationale: 分离器已配置为 fixed pressure mode，但缺少 operating pressure target。为避免凭空指定数值，建议仅添加一个待确认的压力目标占位，由审阅者结合当前流程压力层级确认。
